tipRules.tip: For Yamamoto 10-inch grub: use Gamakatsu EWG Superline 5/0 hook with screw-in 1/4oz weight (F rig) and delayed hookset. Straight shank hooks cause missed fish
Slow presentation and work the 10-inch grub methodically on deep grass beds for best results

knowledge.insight: Key to catching fish on Yamamoto 10-inch grub is delayed hookset with EWG hook and screw-in weight. Using straight shank hook and standard hookset results in many lost fish
Yamamoto 10-inch grub requires Gamakatsu EWG Superline 5/0 hook with screw-in 1/4oz weight (F rig). Wrong hook and rigging method causes constant missed fish
